title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A YouTube tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python. The video demonstrates building a serverless REST API by first manually configuring DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway through the console, then rebuilding the entire system using CDK with a single deploy command to highlight the benefits of IaC.
